name: BigCommerce API
what_it_does: Enterprise-grade hosted ecommerce platform with REST and GraphQL APIs for managing products, orders, customers, promotions, and storefronts with strong B2B and headless commerce support.
use_cases: Managing product catalog and complex pricing tiers via API
Order management and fulfillment automation from agents
B2B customer group management and pricing rules
Headless storefront data fetching via GraphQL Storefront API
not_for: Small businesses just starting ecommerce (Shopify is simpler)
Developers wanting the largest app ecosystem (Shopify has more)
best_when: You're building for a mid-market to enterprise retailer needing strong B2B features, headless commerce, and more API flexibility than Shopify.
avoid_when: You're a small merchant who wants simplicity or need the largest third-party app ecosystem.

auth.notes: Store API uses X-Auth-Token header with access token. OAuth2 for app publishing. Access token with granular scopes per resource type. Agent-friendly.

pricing.notes: 15-day free trial. Similar pricing to Shopify. API included in all plans. Enterprise features like custom price lists require higher plans.

performance.rate_limits: 450 requests/30 seconds per store (standard); higher on Enterprise

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-structured error responses with title, detail, and status fields. Documentation covers error scenarios well.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Some endpoints support idempotent upserts. No global idempotency key header.
known_agent_gotchas: Rate limits are per-store not per-API-key - shared across all apps on the store
Product variants use a separate variants API endpoint from product creation
Price lists for B2B require Enterprise plan
Webhook event types are extensive but inconsistently documented
Storefront GraphQL API has different auth than management REST API

security_score_components.security_notes: API access tokens with granular OAuth scopes. Separate client credentials and access tokens. PCI DSS Level 1. SOC2 Type II. Checkout API has additional security requirements. Webhook HMAC validation.
